action.reasoning: Observation: Latest run hit strong val peak 0.7591 (ES@24), test 0.7574 (below best 0.7583 from iter17 with e=256/h=768). Pipeline stable (full ckpt keys saved, predict contract works on /tmp, ~65s/iter, 12min left). Curves show fast initial drop then overfitting. Analysis: Embedded LSTM-DKT effective (interaction embeds, per-skill FC, masking, clip/ES/scheduler); higher embed helped val before, but gen gap needs stronger reg (dropout/wd), slightly lower LR, balanced capacity/more epochs for finer convergence without OOM. Decision: Overwrite all 3 files with complete consistent versions (full hparam ckpt, no deprecation/verbose, robust ES/clip/jsonl-only, arg parsing, exact inference match); tune to e=384/h=1024/d=0.55/lr=8e-5/wd=2e-4/bs=32/epochs=70/es=16/sch=5 for richer reps + updates + reg to raise val peak and test AUC. Then train+local predict validation on copied val.pt+submit_eval.
action.command: mkdir -p /tmp/test_data && cp /data/val.pt /tmp/test_data/test.pt && python train.py && python predict.py --data_path /tmp/test_data --checkpoint best_model.pt --output /tmp/output.json && ls -l /tmp/output.json && echo 'CKPT keys:' && python -c 'import torch; ckpt=torch.load("best_model.pt", weights_only=False); print(list(ckpt.keys())); print("embed_size:", ckpt.get("embed_size"))'
